title: Copper Energy Strip  8ft .5mm
shortDescription: Premium copper vastu strip for balancing negative energies and vastu defect correction.
description: The Copper Energy Strip is specially designed for vastu corrections and energy balancing in homes, offices, and commercial spaces. Copper is known for its strong conductive and energy-balancing properties, making it highly effective for neutralizing vastu doshas and restoring harmony. These strips can be installed in floors, walls, entrances, or problematic zones to improve positive energy flow, stability, prosperity, and peace.
benefits: Suitable for home and office use
Easy installation under flooring or walls

Ideal for placement in flooring, walls, or entrances where energy correction is required.

benefits: Suitable for residential and commercial spaces

title: Aluminium Energy Strip 8ft .5mm
